original_image_tags: A high-contrast, black-and-white photocopy of a typed form. The background is dark grey/black, with the typed text appearing white. The word "RESTRICTED" is stamped in large, sans-serif capital letters at the top center and again at the bottom center. Three hole-punch marks are visible on the left margin. The number "132" is handwritten in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: A typed form titled 'CHECK-LIST - UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS' with the header 'RESTRICTED' at the top and bottom. The form contains typed fields and entries for Incident # 61, including date '8 Sept 47', time '2230 P.M.', location 'Logan, Utah', and observer 'Mr and Mrs. Richard Anderson'. The form is filled out with typed text and contains two black circular holes on the left margin and a handwritten number '132' in the bottom right corner.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content of a 'RESTRICTED' typed form with two hole-punches and a handwritten '132', but Description B adds specific caption text (title, date, location, observer) that Description A omits without contradiction.
